properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v10 v11 v12 v13 v14 v15 v16 v17 v18

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Oh Lord my God! When I in awesome wonder, Consider all the worlds Thy hands have made; I see the stars, I hear the rolling thunder, Thy pow'r throughout The universe displayed.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Then sings my soul, My Saviour God to Thee; How great Thou art, How great Thou art! Then sings my soul, My Saviour God to Thee; How great Thou art, How great Thou art!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: When through the woods, And forest glades I wander And hear the birds, Sing sweetly in the trees; When I look down, From lofty mountain grandeur And hear the brook And feel the gentle breeze.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Then sings my soul, My Saviour God to Thee; How great Thou art, How great Thou art! Then sings my soul, My Saviour God to Thee; How great Thou art, How great Thou art!

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: And when I think that God, His Son not sparing, Sent Him to die, I scarce can take it in; That on the cross, My burden gladly bearing, He bled and died, To take away my sin.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: When Christ shall come, With shout of acclamation And take me home, What joy shall fill my heart! Then I shall bow, In humble adoration And there proclaim, My God, how great Thou art!

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Then sings my soul, My Saviour God to Thee; How great Thou art, How great Thou art! Then sings my soul, My Saviour God to Thee; How great Thou art, How great Thou art!

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: So I lift my eyes to You Lord In Your strength will I break through Lord Touch me now Let Your love fall down on me I know Your love dispels all my fears

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Through the storm I will hold on Lord And by faith I will walk on Lord And I'll see beyond my calvary one day And I will be complete in You

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: Here I am, Oh God I bring this sacrifice My open heart I offer up my life I look to You, Lord Your love that never ends Restores me again

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: So I lift my eyes to You Lord In Your strength will I break through Lord Touch me now Let Your love fall down on me I know Your love dispels all my fears

verse.name: v12
verse.lines: Through the storm I will hold on Lord And by faith I will walk on Lord And I'll see beyond my calvary one day And I will be complete in You

verse.name: v13
verse.lines: So, arise to Your rest And be blessed by our praise As we glory in Your embrace As Your presence now fills this place

verse.name: v14
verse.lines: O the glory of Your presence We Your temple give You reverence So, arise to Your rest And be blessed by our praise As we glory in Your embrace As Your presence now fills this place

verse.name: v15
verse.lines: So, arise to Your rest And be blessed by our praise As we glory in Your embrace As Your presence now fills this place

verse.name: v16
verse.lines: There is no higher calling No greater honor Than to bow and kneel before Your throne I'm amazed at Your glory, Embraced by Your mercy Oh Lord, I live to worship You

verse.name: v17
verse.lines: Down at Your feet, Oh Lord Is the most high place In Your presence, Lord I seek Your face, I seek Your face

verse.name: v18
verse.lines: There is no higher calling No greater honor Than to bow and kneel before Your throne I'm amazed at Your glory, Embraced by Your mercy Oh Lord, I live to worship You
